welcome:
👋 Welcome to ArchiveBot!

I'm your personal content archiving assistant. I can help you:

📦 Archive various content (text, images, videos, documents)
🏷️ Automatically tag and categorize
🔍 Quickly search archived content
💾 Multi-level storage strategy

Send me any content or use commands:

/help - View help
/search - Search archives
/tags - View all tags
/stats - View statistics
/language - Change language

Let's get started! 🚀
help: 📖 Help Archive Content: • Send any content directly to me • Add tags using #tag format Commands: /start - Initialize bot /help - View this help /search <keyword> - Search archives /tags - View all tags /stats - View statistics /language - Change language Search: • Keyword search: /search python • Tag search: /search #tech • Combined search: /search #tech python Tags: Automatic tags: #text, #image, #video, #document, #link Manual tags: Add #your_tag when sending content
unauthorized:
⛔ Unauthorized

Sorry, this bot is for private use only.
search_no_keyword:
Please provide search keyword.

Example: /search python
tags_empty:
No tags yet.

Start archiving content to create tags!
language_select:
🌍 Select Language:

 Please choose your preferred language:
